_comment: Canonical wire format for bound operator context carried in X-G8E-Bound-Operators header from g8ed to G8EE. This model ensures wire compatibility and enforces consistency across components.

bound_operator_context._description: Single bound operator entry in the X-G8E-Bound-Operators header array. g8ed resolves this from the database (BoundSessionsDocument + operator docs) and g8ee parses it from the HTTP header.

operator_session_id.description: Operator session identifier for this binding

bound_web_session_id.description: Web session ID this operator is bound to (for binding validation)

status.description: Operator status (e.g., 'bound', 'active', 'available'). Consumers should validate against their own enum values.
